batch_summary: In Monica's apartment, Joey tries to take a break from a construction project, but a demanding Monica humorously forces him back to work. Meanwhile, Phoebe is hanging out with Frank Jr. when she receives an urgent call to go to work. When she explains she is a masseuse, Frank mistakenly assumes she works at a sketchy massage parlor and laughs. To clear up the misunderstanding, Phoebe invites him to join her and get a massage himself.

As she prepares to leave, she explains to Frank that she works as a masseuse. Frank misinterprets her profession, laughing as he assumes she works at a sketchy massage parlor. Amused but wanting to set the record straight, Phoebe clarifies her job and invites Frank to accompany her so he can experience a professional massage himself.

batch_summary: Phoebe clarifies that she won't personally massage Frank Jr., offering to have a colleague do it instead, which Frank eagerly accepts. Meanwhile, Joey, Chandler, and Monica admire their newly finished, classic checkered bathroom floor. Later, Ross proudly presents a laminated card containing his finalized list of celebrity crushes, which Chandler printed for him. Rachel reads the names aloud, including Uma Thurman and Dorothy Hamill, to the amused group.

batch_summary: Phoebe reveals that Frank Jr.'s parting gift was actually their father's melted garage door opener. Meanwhile, Chandler recruits the group to help lift a massive, custom-built entertainment unit in his and Joey's apartment.
